Work About Contact

About me

I build production AI systems, then make them usable. The edge is an unusual one: years as an educator, so I build for the people and models that actually have to use the output.

My journey

Today I build production AI and software systems. As a technical co-founder at storipro, I shipped the platform's Stripe billing integration, worked out how its data could be attacked and locked it down, and built an autonomous issue-to-PR pipeline. At commercetools, I architected an orchestrator-agent AI authoring system with its own eval harness and drove a single-source-of-truth documentation program across the platform.

I got here from an unusual direction. I came up as an educator, a decade of it across three continents. I taught political philosophy at Universiteit Maastricht, English to Italian executives and at La Trobe University, then led a humanities department of 30+ educators in Australian secondary education. Co-founding 3 Steps Away, a social-justice education enterprise, taught me to take a system from concept to market.

Building something well and explaining it clearly don't always come from the same person. I spent years making complex ideas land for real people, so I design systems for the humans and agents that use them. That means clear interfaces, honest failure modes, and docs that actually double as a contract. I formalized the craft with a Graduate Certificate in Educational Design from Monash University. The engineering I formalized by shipping.

What I do

I work at the intersection of building and communicating. I architect and ship applied-AI systems, then make them clear to the people and models that use them. Here's where that splits.

AI Systems & Agents

I design and ship agentic systems: orchestrator-agent architectures, RAG and retrieval, autonomous pipelines. I built an AI authoring system with its own eval harness, and an autonomous issue-to-PR pipeline running in production CI.

Agentic Engineering (Claude Code)

I operate the full agentic toolchain: subagents, dynamic workflows, eval harnesses, MCP servers, headless Claude Code in CI, worktrees, CLAUDE.md schemas. I run the stack, I don't just call the API.

Production Software Engineering

I ship hardened production code. A full Stripe billing integration with idempotency and self-healing reconciliation, a threat-modelled Firestore security layer proven with an emulator test suite, and distributed-systems hygiene throughout.

Learning Systems (the edge)

A decade spent making complex ideas land. I bring information architecture, single-source-of-truth design, and curriculum thinking to the systems I build, so the agents and humans that depend on them can actually use them.

My philosophy

I build for judgment, not output. Anyone can wire up an API call. The value is in the decisions: what to build, what to reject, and how you'll know it worked. Every system I ship leads with the architecture call and the trade-off behind it, backed by evals, quality gates, and honest failure handling.

I treat documentation as data and interfaces as contracts. The hardest part of an AI system isn't the model. It's making the behaviour clear and the output trustworthy to the humans and agents downstream. That's where the years in education compound. The real work there was earning enough trust that people would engage, then making hard things click. I design systems with the same instinct and an eye on developer experience: build for whoever has to use the output, human or model.

And I validate before I claim. A number I can defend in an interview beats a demo every time. The receipts carry the work.

Professional timeline

2025-Present

Technical Co-Founder

storipro (proptech), remote

Joined as a contract engineer and came on as technical co-founder after shipping the platform's production systems. That covered the Stripe billing integration, a hardened Firestore security model proven with an emulator test suite, an autonomous issue-to-PR pipeline, and the data pipelines that feed the platform.

2022-Present

Senior Instructional Designer / Learning Systems Architect

commercetools, remote in Italy and Australia

Architected an orchestrator-agent AI authoring system with an eval harness, built agentic content-drift detection running in CI, and drove a single-source-of-truth documentation program across the platform. Did all of it while designing the learning systems that serve thousands of global developers. Led the team's adoption of the agentic toolchain.

2022

Graduate Certificate in Educational Design

Monash University, Australia

Formal training in instructional design principles, learning theory, and evidence-based assessment strategies.

2019-2022

Co-Founder & Learning Designer

3 Steps Away, Australia

Built social justice education enterprise from concept to market delivery. Led end-to-end learning strategy, product development, and commercialization of blended learning experiences.

2019-2021

Humanities Learning Area Leader & House Leader

Emmaus College, Australia

Managed team of 30+ educators overseeing 15 subject programs. Led strategic learning operations and provided senior leadership for cohort of 150 students.

2014-2018

Online Interfaith Dialogue Facilitator

Generation Global, remote international

Facilitated 200+ international video dialogues. Designed dialogue experiences across complex cultural contexts while managing stakeholder relationships with ministers, NGO founders, and thought leaders.

2011-2018

Social Justice Coordinator & Teacher

St Monica's College, Australia

Coordinated extracurricular program for 150+ students. Designed experiential learning units and implemented state curriculum across multiple year levels and disciplines.

2007

Master of Arts (Arts and Sciences)

Universiteit Maastricht, the Netherlands

Focus on anthropology, international development policy, and contemporary world history.

2003-2006

Bachelor of Arts (Humanities and Social Sciences)

Universiteit Maastricht, the Netherlands

Focus on history, philosophy, international politics and sociology.

Let's work together

I'm open to applied-AI, Solutions Architect, and Forward-Deployed Engineer roles, anywhere the job is to architect production AI systems and make them usable. If that's what you're building, I'd love to connect.

Get in touch View my work

Luke Panaccio

I build production AI systems and make them usable. Years as an educator taught me to build for the person on the other end, so the systems actually get used.
